_comment: Marked By Hand — quote tool settings. Edit here to retune every quote. NOTE: this file is served to the browser, so anyone can read it. Keep truly sensitive logic (final margins, cost) server-side once the pricing API is live. ownerKey only HIDES the rate card from customers; it is not real security.

grades.whyFunctional: If your piece is a template, jig, prototype, or anything where the cut edges won't be on show, you don't need flame-polished perfection. Functional grade skips the extra edge finishing and runs faster — the cut is just as accurate, the price is lower. Choose Display grade when the edges will be seen.
